content: I will use `multi_replace_file_content` to add correct image mapping properties to the grocery products array and update the `renderGroceryStore` rendering function in `js/app.js`.

args.Description: "Added image properties to state.groceryProducts and updated renderGroceryStore in js/app.js to display real images."
args.Instruction: "Add image properties to groceryProducts in state, and display img tags instead of icon visuals in renderGroceryStore cards."
